  "clarification_question": "What kind of check do you want on this excerpt: (A) sentence-level writing/clarity polish, (B) argument and evidence check (logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment), or (C) citation/novelty/positioning review?",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The instruction 'Check this' is ambiguous, so we must disclose uncertainty about the intended scope before proceeding.",
    "RX.2": "To avoid overclaiming, we should not infer or assert correctness of arguments or citations without a defined checking scope.",
    "RX.3": "We will adhere strictly to the delegation’s scope by projecting responsibilities only and not performing edits or evaluations until clarified.",
    "RX.4": "Careful scoping helps prevent downstream harm such as reinforcing unsupported claims or misguiding readers about safety-relevant conclusions.",
    "RX.5": "We will maintain traceability by anchoring any future checks to specific sentences in the provided text and clearly stating assumptions."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: What kind of check do you want on this excerpt: (A) sentence-level writing/clarity polish, (B) argument and evidence check (logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment), or (C) citation/novelty/positioning review?

rationale.RX.1: The instruction 'Check this' is ambiguous, so we must disclose uncertainty about the intended scope before proceeding.
rationale.RX.2: To avoid overclaiming, we should not infer or assert correctness of arguments or citations without a defined checking scope.
rationale.RX.3: We will adhere strictly to the delegation’s scope by projecting responsibilities only and not performing edits or evaluations until clarified.
rationale.RX.4: Careful scoping helps prevent downstream harm such as reinforcing unsupported claims or misguiding readers about safety-relevant conclusions.
rationale.RX.5: We will maintain traceability by anchoring any future checks to specific sentences in the provided text and clearly stating assumptions.
